degeneracy: D. Carries no structural information by construction; the simplicity benchmark.
D*A - monotone INCREASING in A. A pure accessibility taste.
D*(1-A) - monotone DECREASING in A. A pure scarcity taste. This is D x M*.

D*sqrt(A*(1-A)) - a HUMP peaking at A=0.50. Rewards the middle BY CONSTRUCTION, not by evidence. NOT INJECTIVE: A=0.2 and A=0.8 score identically, so a highly accessible set and an extreme-chase set are declared equally appealing.
D*(+0.50*A + 0.25) - linear in A, favouring accessibility. Structural content scales with |wA-wM| = 0.50.
D*(+0.20*A + 0.40) - linear in A, favouring accessibility. Structural content scales with |wA-wM| = 0.20.
D*((wA-wM)*A + wM) with wA=wM -> the A term CANCELS and the candidate collapses to a rescaled D (0.50*D). Zero structural content: fully DEGENERATE.
D*(-0.20*A + 0.60) - linear in A, favouring chase intensity. Structural content scales with |wA-wM| = 0.20.
D*(-0.50*A + 0.75) - linear in A, favouring chase intensity. Structural content scales with |wA-wM| = 0.50.

D*(cancels (wA=wM) + 0.45 + 0.10*A*(1-A)) - the interaction term A*(1-A) is the SAME hump as CA3. With wA=wM the linear part cancels and the candidate becomes a pure rescaled hump: it rewards the middle by construction.

D*(cancels (wA=wM) + 0.40 + 0.20*A*(1-A)) - the interaction term A*(1-A) is the SAME hump as CA3. With wA=wM the linear part cancels and the candidate becomes a pure rescaled hump: it rewards the middle by construction.

D*(cancels (wA=wM) + 0.35 + 0.30*A*(1-A)) - the interaction term A*(1-A) is the SAME hump as CA3. With wA=wM the linear part cancels and the candidate becomes a pure rescaled hump: it rewards the middle by construction.
D*(floor + gain*P). Independent of position on the A<->M axis by construction; reads the ORTHOGONAL dual-path structure instead. Does not encode a taste.
